instructions: Resolve the threads under `## Review threads to resolve` with the `resolve:` command shown below. These threads are already outdated or minimized, so no code edit is required for them unless their body reveals separate work you choose to do.

Items in `## First-look items` are shown so you can acknowledge their current status before acting. If a first-look thread also appears under `## Review threads to resolve`, its ID is already included in the `resolve:` command; otherwise do not pass first-look-only IDs to mutation flags.

For any large decisions or rejections you made this iteration, add or update a `## Shepherd Journal` section in the PR description (`gh pr edit 42 --body …`) summarizing each decision. For threads and comments, use the markdown link shown in its heading above; for reviews, reference the review ID. If this section already exists, append your entries under it instead of creating a duplicate heading.
Stop this iteration — if you pushed new commits, CI needs time before the next tick; otherwise stop before the next tick. Recheck: rerun `pr-shepherd 42` to recheck once after a fresh 30s–4m delay.
